title: Finding the Way
sentences: Aram drives the car towards the center.
— This building is very beautiful, — says Anna.
— We are going to the hotel now.
— Այն մոտ է, պետք է գնալ
— It is close, we must go straight.
— And then we must turn left.
— There is also a bank there.
— I need to cross the street.
— Here is your hotel, it is big.
— It is a very good place, close to everything.
— The shop is located on the other side of the road.
— Tomorrow we will walk along this street.
— And now it is time to rest.
dictionary:
կենտրոն - center
հրապարակ - square
գեղեցիկ - beautiful
հյուրանոց - hotel
որտեղ - where
ուղիղ - straight
աջ - right
ձախ - left
բանկ - bank
փողոց - street
մեծ - big
վայր - place
խանութ - shop
վաղը - tomorrow
հիմա - now
